MaorForward › AI Engine Pillar
Pillar 2

We're Not Using AI. We're Building It.

Commercial AI doesn't know what a niggun of Yud-Beis Tammuz sounds like. It can't write in the cadence of Anash. It doesn't understand when a scene needs a chayus that can't be prompted.

So we're building our own.

The Engine

Six Proprietary Modules

Six purpose-built AI modules. Internal infrastructure today. Industry-standard infrastructure tomorrow. Click any module for the full technical breakdown, roadmap, and demo.

The Thesis

From Internal Tool to Industry Infrastructure

These engines start as internal. But the moment they reach production-grade, they become the first-ever AI content infrastructure purpose-built for the Jewish world.

Every other Jewish educational organization — Chabad.org, Aish, Kehot, Merkos, Hidabroot — faces the same content ceiling we faced. They cannot afford Hollywood production. They cannot use generic AI without compromising authenticity.

They will license ours.

$50K-$500K Annual licensing tier per organization
$3M-$8M Projected annual SaaS revenue by Year 5
100% Recurring revenue that sustains Maor in perpetuity
This is the moat. $750K here is not tzedakah — it is the seeding of infrastructure that will serve the Jewish world for generations.
The Reach

What the Engine Enables: Three New Audiences

The engine is the moat. The audiences are the proof of impact and the first revenue model. Three audiences the Rebbe explicitly demanded we reach — each with $100K starter capital that becomes self-sustaining through subscriptions, licensing, and partnerships.

Audience One

Frum Children

650,000 Orthodox Jewish children worldwide

Bringing the warmth of Chassidus to the broader Orthodox world — Litvish, Chassidish, Modern Orthodox — through joyful, story-first storytelling.

$100K starter capital View full plan →
Audience Two

Secular Jewish Children

1,200,000 Secular Jewish children worldwide

Reaching them where they already are — YouTube, TikTok, streaming — with content that is proud, joyful, and unmistakably Jewish without being preachy.

$100K starter capital View full plan →
Audience Three

Children of the World

2 Billion Non-Jewish children globally

The first-ever professional, serialized children's content teaching the Seven Noahide Laws as a framework for moral identity.

$100K starter capital View full plan →
The Plan

$750K Allocation

$200K to build the engine and recruit the team. $300K split equally across the three audiences as starter capital — designed to make each audience self-sustaining within 24 months.

$200,000
AI Engine — Build & Team
  • Engine development (compute, training, fine-tuning across 5 modules)
  • Talent recruitment: ML engineer, content systems specialist
  • Studio + production equipment for engine integration
  • Operations: testing, validation, halachic review pipeline
$300,000
Audience Launches — 3 × $100K
  • Frum Children — $100K starter capital
  • Secular Jewish Children — $100K starter capital
  • Children of the World — $100K starter capital

Each $100K funds initial content, distribution, and marketing — sized to drive subscriptions, licensing, and partnerships that sustain the audience independently.

Let's bring Moshiach, together.

Underwriting Defaults - Edit Mode

Hidden control panel for managing the calculator's default values. Three options below: save current values to your browser as your local default, export current values as JSON to send to Claude for permanent code update, or restore the original code defaults.

Save Current Values as Local Default

Stores the current 22 input values in your browser. Next time you open this file (in this browser), these values will load instead of the code defaults. Cleared if you clear browser data.

Export JSON for Permanent Update

Exports the current values as a JSON snippet. Copy and send to Claude - Claude will embed it as the new code default for all future versions of this file. This is the way to make the values "stick" forever. 


        

      


      

        
Restore Original Code Defaults

        

          Resets all 22 values back to the original DATA defaults built into this file's code. Also clears any local browser save.
        

        

          
        

      


      

        
How to Open This Panel

        

          Desktop: Press Ctrl + Shift + E (or Cmd + Shift + E on Mac).
          


          Anywhere: Type the word maor on the keyboard (anywhere on the page, no input focus needed).
          


          Mobile: Long-press (1.5 seconds) on the bottom-right corner of the screen.
